creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Peter,

I think I fixed this issue. The problem was some regression in logic introduced as a solution for bug #196909

Please let us know if mailing lists still receives irrelevant emails. 

Commit reference: https://github.com/freebsd/bugzilla/commit/26fb612b6f8d4aadc1dca9af052c1c9b1185f610
